search_document:
User Request: Order summary dashboard.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Monthly Revenue
Type: chart
Description: Monthly revenue trend
Title: Top Customers by Region
Type: table
Description: Highest spending customers aggregated by region
Title: Total Revenue
Type: kpi
Description: Overall revenue from all orders
Title: Order Count by Month
Type: chart
Description: Number of orders placed each month
Title: Average Order Value
Type: kpi
Description: Average value of orders
Title: Orders by Status
Type: pie_chart
Description: Distribution of orders by shipping status

sql_queries.title: Monthly Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', OrderDate) AS Month, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM Orders o JOIN 'Order Details' od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY Month ORDER BY Month

sql_queries.title: Top Customers by Region
sql_queries.description: Highest spending customers aggregated by region
sql_queries.sql: SELECT c.Region, c.CompanyName, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalSpent FROM Orders o JOIN 'Order Details' od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID JOIN Customers c ON o.CustomerID = c.CustomerID GROUP BY c.Region, c.CompanyName ORDER BY c.Region, TotalSpent DESC

sql_queries.title: Total Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM Orders o JOIN 'Order Details' od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID

sql_queries.title: Order Count by Month
sql_queries.description: Number of orders placed each month
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', OrderDate) AS Month, COUNT(OrderID) AS OrderCount FROM Orders GROUP BY Month ORDER BY Month

sql_queries.title: Average Order Value
sql_queries.sql: SELECT AVG(TotalOrderValue) AS AverageOrderValue FROM (SELECT o.OrderID, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalOrderValue FROM Orders o JOIN 'Order Details' od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY o.OrderID)

sql_queries.title: Orders by Status
sql_queries.description: Distribution of orders by shipping status
sql_queries.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN ShippedDate IS NOT NULL THEN 'Shipped' ELSE 'Pending' END AS Status, COUNT(OrderID) AS OrderCount FROM Orders GROUP BY Status
